time_model.event_time: time when the event/news was actually published or occurred
time_model.discovered_time: time when Tokenoskobi could have seen the event
time_model.visible_data_until: max timestamp visible to blind model

critical_rule: event_time and discovered_time must be separated.
blind_test_rule: visible_data_until must be based on discovered_time, not later market outcome.
